'''Bresan''' was one of three primary [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Pimbrellan League]]. It was not as hospitable as nearby [[Dolstan]]. Its [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] could not sustain most [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] life. Sealed dome cities were built in underground cave systems. Profits from trade with Dolstan were used to support life support facilities.

*<!-- 1996-01-15 -->''[[The Kathol Outback]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
